calendar.matters:
Petition To Compel Production Of Trust Documents; To Remove Trustee And Appoint Successor Trustee; And To Compel An Accounting.
Off Calendar Mar-01-2011 Off Calendar

Petition To Compel Production Of Trust Documents; To Remove Trustee And Appoint Successor Trustee; And To Compel An Accounting.
Off Calendar Feb-15-2011 Continued To Mar-01-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dean Lloyd appeared by telephone for Gwendolyn Madison.

The Court noted that Mr. Triay was not present and stated that there was concern that he makes no statement of standing as to Ms. Jones being an Heir at law. The matter was continued to March 1, 2011 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Lloyd will appear by court call.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
